message:
test(gui): pin paragraph-offset rebase math for ft-6scm7 (ft-5qph8)

Extract the harfbuzz cluster-rebase loop from cached_cluster_shape into a
free function `rebase_glyph_clusters` so the math is testable without
TermWindow / GpuState scaffolding. Adds 5 unit tests covering the cases
ft-6scm7's acceptance asked for: zero-offset identity, positive rebase
(simulating a cluster starting mid-paragraph during RTL+Indic shaping),
boundary at cluster == offset, the explicit-error path when the shaper
emits a cluster preceding the paragraph start, and empty-slice no-op.

Closes the acceptance gap noted in ft-5qph8: the helper
`cluster_paragraph_context` already had a unit test, but the rebase
arithmetic at render/mod.rs:854-867 was untested.
